description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble a menacing animatronic bear with a dark brown, textured body and segmented limbs. Its face features hollow, black eye sockets and a wide, gaping mouth filled with sharp, metallic-looking teeth, giving it a sinister appearance. The bear wears a small black top hat and a black bow tie on its chest, adding a touch of formality to its otherwise intimidating look. The hands and feet are detailed with metallic claws, and the joints are visibly segmented, mimicking the look of an animatronic figure. The back of the toy is plain, with the same textured brown surface and visible seams at the joints. The overall construction suggests a plush exterior with possible internal support for the segmented limbs and head.
description: A dark brown, segmented animatronic bear stuffed toy with a top hat, bow tie, and sharp metallic teeth and claws, giving it a sinister appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's hollow eyes, wide mouth with sharp teeth, black top hat, and bow tie.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding snout, visible teeth, and segmented arm and leg joints.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the plain brown textured surface, visible seams, and the back of the top hat.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the snout, teeth, and segmented limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is menacing, with hollow, black eye sockets and a wide, open mouth filled with sharp, metallic teeth, giving a threatening and aggressive look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs apart, head facing forward.
